user.title: Set up SMA Sunny Boy Bluetooth Home Assistant Integration
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth address of your legacy SMA Sunny Boy or Sunny Tripower inverter. Example: 00:80:25:16:38:CC. Default intervals: AC power 30 s, energy today 180 s, energy total 180 s, temperature 60 s.

error.invalid_bt_address: The Bluetooth address is invalid. Example: 00:80:25:16:38:CC

abort.already_configured: This SMA Bluetooth inverter is already configured.
